prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of a futuristic street warrior standing in the center of a narrow neon-lit alley at night in a rain-soaked Asian megacity. Medium close-up framing from the chest up, subject facing forward, with the face partially obscured by a large centered rectangular censor block in muted teal-green. The character has messy glowing {argument name="hair color" default="bright cyan"} hair, a visible cybernetic right eye area with metallic facial implants, cables and mechanical details around the neck and jaw, and a rugged high-tech armored jacket with straps, buckles, tubes, segmented plating, and luminous cyan and orange light accents. Use a dramatic teal-and-orange color palette, glossy wet pavement reflections, soft rain in the air, dense atmospheric haze, and heavy bokeh from neon signage in the background. The alley should contain 8 visible glowing sign clusters, mostly vertical and horizontal signs with Chinese characters, plus futuristic storefront lights and industrial wall details. Make the mood gritty, stylish, dystopian, and ultra-detailed, with sharp focus on the subject and a blurred background, as if from a high-end sci-fi film still.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具电影质感的赛博朋克肖像，描绘了一位未来主义街头战士，站在雨水浸润的亚洲大都市夜晚，一条狭窄且霓虹闪烁的巷道中央。采用胸部以上的半身特写构图，主体面向前方，面部被一个位于中心的大型矩形遮挡块部分遮盖，呈现柔和的青绿色。角色拥有凌乱且发光的 {argument name="hair color" default="明亮青色"} 头发，右眼区域可见明显的赛博格特征及金属面部植入物，颈部和下颌周围布满线缆与机械细节，身穿粗犷的高科技装甲夹克，配有绑带、扣环、管道、分段式护板以及青色和橙色的发光装饰。采用戏剧性的青橙色调，地面呈现湿润的倒影，空气中飘着细雨，背景中弥漫着浓厚的雾气，霓虹招牌产生强烈的背景虚化效果。巷道中应包含 8 组清晰可见的发光招牌，多为带有中文字符的竖向和横向标识，辅以未来感十足的店面灯光和工业风墙面细节。整体氛围粗粝、时尚、反乌托邦且极具细节感，主体焦点清晰，背景虚化，呈现出高端科幻电影剧照的质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 赛博朋克霓虹巷道肖像：此提示词可生成极具电影质感的赛博朋克角色肖像，适用于科幻关键视觉图、社交媒体帖文或未来主义概念图像。
breakdown.subject: 空间
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
